data.title: Coatue founder: Bitcoin volatility is decreasing and will become a core asset in investment portfolios
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Philippe Laffont, founder of Coatue Management, said that although the high volatility of Bitcoin in the early days made him wait and see about crypto assets, Bitcoin is now gradually maturing with the participation of institutional investors. He pointed out that as Bitcoin's volatility decreases and market awareness increases, its position in the investment portfolio will become "more important" and is expected to become one of the core configuration assets.

data.title: Circle CEO: Stablecoins may be the most practical form of currency, and the "iPhone moment" has not yet arrived
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Circle co-founder and CEO Jeremy Allaire recently posted on the X platform that stablecoins may be the most practical form of currency in history, but the entire industry has not yet reached a critical node similar to the "iPhone moment". He pointed out that once the stablecoin industry enters this stage, developers will be able to unlock programmable digital dollars like unlocking programmable mobile phones. At that time, digital dollars will unleash huge potential on the Internet and bring extensive opportunities. He believes that this era may not be far away.

data.title: FSB Chair Warns of Potential Systemic Risks in Cryptocurrency Markets
data.description:
According to PANews, Klaas Knot, the outgoing chairman of the Financial Stability Board (FSB), has issued a stern warning about the cryptocurrency market, suggesting it may be nearing a 'critical point' that could pose systemic risks to the global financial system. Knot highlighted the significant holdings of U.S. Treasury bonds by stablecoin issuers, emphasizing the need for close monitoring of this sector.

He noted that the barriers for retail investors have significantly lowered, particularly following the introduction of cryptocurrency ETFs, which has strengthened ties with the traditional financial system. Knot underscored the necessity for proactive regulation, stating, 'The crypto ecosystem will continue to evolve, and our regulatory framework must do the same.'

data.title: Shopify x CoinBase φέρνουν το USDC στο καλάθι αγορών
data.description:
Φαντάσου να μπορείς να πληρώνεις για τις online αγορές σου με ένα ψηφιακό δολάριο που παραμένει πάντα σταθερό στην αξία του, χωρίς επιπλέον χρεώσεις, καθυστερήσεις ή μετατροπές νομισμάτων. Αυτό ακριβώς έρχεται να κάνει η Shopify από τις 12 Ιουνίου 2025, συνεργαζόμενη με την Coinbase για να φέρει το stablecoin USDC στον βωμό του παγκόσμιου ηλεκτρονικού εμπορίου. Η αρχή θα γίνει σε ένα περιορισμένο αριθμό ατόμων, αλλά σύντομα εκατομμύρια καταστήματα που χρησιμοποιούν το Shopify Payments θα μπορούν να δέχονται USDC μέσω του Base του γρήγορου, φθηνού και ασφαλούς δικτύου της Coinbase πάνω στο Ethereum. Στόχος; Πιο απλές, πιο οικονομικές και πιο παγκόσμιες πληρωμές με τη δύναμη των crypto
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/bitcoin-news/shopify-coinbase-fernoun-to-usdc/
